meta.summary: Another GTF/GFF Analysis Toolkit for sanitizing, converting, filtering, editing, and summarizing genome annotation files.
meta.description: Another GTF/GFF Analysis Toolkit for sanitizing, converting, filtering, editing, and summarizing genome annotation files.

test: agat --version 2>&1 | grep -F '1.7.0' >/dev/null && (agat --help 2>&1 || true) | grep -Ei 'usage|agat' >/dev/null && (agat --tools 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'agat_convert_sp_gxf2gxf.pl' >/dev/null && (agat_convert_sp_gxf2gxf.pl --help 2>&1 || true) | grep -Ei 'standardi[sz]es|GTF/GFF|gxf' >/dev/null && perl -MAGAT::AGAT -MBio::SeqIO -MYAML -MParallel::ForkManager -e 'print "$AGAT::AGAT::VERSION\n"' | grep -F '1.7.0' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-agat-standardize && cd /tmp/taf-agat-standardize && printf '##gff-version 3\nchr1\tProdigal\tCDS\t1\t9\t.\t+\t0\tID=cds1;locus_tag=gene1;product=hypothetical protein\n' > input.gff3 && agat_convert_sp_gxf2gxf.pl --gff input.gff3 -o fixed.gff3 >/tmp/taf-agat-standardize.log 2>&1 && test -s fixed.gff3 && grep -F 'gene' fixed.gff3 >/dev/null && grep -F 'mRNA' fixed.gff3 >/dev/null && grep -F 'ID=cds1' fixed.gff3 >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-agat-convert && cd /tmp/taf-agat-convert && printf '##gff-version 3\nchr1\tProdigal\tCDS\t1\t9\t.\t+\t0\tID=cds1;locus_tag=gene1;product=hypothetical protein\n' > input.gff3 && agat_convert_sp_gxf2gxf.pl --gff input.gff3 -o fixed.gff3 >/tmp/taf-agat-convert-gxf.log 2>&1 && agat_convert_sp_gff2gtf.pl --gff fixed.gff3 -o converted.gtf >/tmp/taf-agat-convert-gtf.log 2>&1 && test -s converted.gtf && grep -F 'transcript_id' converted.gtf >/dev/null && agat_convert_sp_gff2bed.pl --gff fixed.gff3 -o converted.bed >/tmp/taf-agat-convert-bed.log 2>&1 && test -s converted.bed && grep -F 'chr1' converted.bed >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-agat-statistics && cd /tmp/taf-agat-statistics && printf '##gff-version 3\nchr1\tProdigal\tCDS\t1\t9\t.\t+\t0\tID=cds1;locus_tag=gene1;product=hypothetical protein\n' > input.gff3 && agat_convert_sp_gxf2gxf.pl --gff input.gff3 -o fixed.gff3 >/tmp/taf-agat-statistics-gxf.log 2>&1 && agat_sp_statistics.pl --gff fixed.gff3 -o statistics.txt >/tmp/taf-agat-statistics.log 2>&1 && test -s statistics.txt && grep -F 'Number of gene' statistics.txt >/dev/null && samtools --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'samtools' >/dev/null && Rscript --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'Rscript' >/dev/null

upstream.name: AGAT
upstream.citation: Dainat J. 2022. Another Gtf/Gff Analysis Toolkit (AGAT): Resolve interoperability issues and accomplish more with your annotations. Plant and Animal Genome XXIX Conference. https://github.com/NBISweden/AGAT.
